Hallie Ford Museum of Art.failed_test_comment: As of March 26, 2026, the official Hallie Ford Museum of Art JSON feed returns only two exhibition rows for the museum overall while the lecture, family-program, and gallery-talk endpoints are empty, so a dry run currently parses 0 qualifying talks, workshops, or art-activity rows.

Schneider Museum of Art.fail_implement: As of March 26, 2026, the official Upcoming Exhibitions & Events page and its WordPress page payload are empty, and site search surfaces only older 2023 posts rather than a stable current calendar/feed, so there is no reliable first-party source of current dated museum activities to parse.
